Event: Cornucopia Island February 2026
Event Date: 05/03/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI311
Ancestral Knowledge Ring

Once in a while, the unit frightens 3 random enemy units for 3 sec. and casts decay upon the armor of all frightened enemy units on the battlefield. When the enemy is afflicted with decay, that unit receives 176000 pure damage and has their magic armor reduced by 25% for 3 sec. These enemy units also receive 208000 magic damage for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
